description: Define shared project workflow summary schemas for project, phase, task, status mapping, tag result, assignment result, and link result outputs.
Add reusable project workflow helper functions for loading tenant-scoped projects, phases, tasks, tickets, status mappings, and task project context with standardized NOT_FOUND errors.
Add reusable project workflow helper functions for project read/update/delete permission checks that preserve existing project authorization narrowing where applicable.
Add project workflow picker metadata helpers for project, project phase, project task, and project task status/status mapping fields.
Implement `projects.find` input schema with project ID, exact project name, optional external reference when supported, and `on_not_found` behavior matching existing find actions.
Implement `projects.find` handler with tenant-scoped lookup, project read permission enforcement, nullable/error not-found behavior, and project summary output.
Implement `projects.search` input schema with query, filters, page, and page_size following `clients.search` conventions.
Implement `projects.search` handler with tenant-scoped search, authorization filtering, deterministic sorting, total count, first_project, and pagination metadata.
Implement `projects.find_phase` input schema with phase_id, optional project-scoped exact phase name, and `on_not_found` behavior.
Implement `projects.find_phase` handler with project context validation, project read authorization, nullable/error not-found behavior, and phase summary output.
Implement `projects.search_phases` input schema with project scope, optional query/filter fields, page, and page_size.
Implement `projects.search_phases` handler with tenant-scoped phase listing/search, project read authorization, deterministic ordering, first_phase, total, and pagination metadata.
Implement `projects.find_task` input schema with task_id, optional project/phase-scoped exact task name, and `on_not_found` behavior.
Implement `projects.find_task` handler with task context loading, project read authorization, nullable/error not-found behavior, and task summary output.
Implement `projects.search_tasks` input schema with query, project, phase, status/status mapping, assignee, tags, page, and page_size filters where supported by existing data model.
Implement `projects.search_tasks` handler with tenant-scoped task search, joins to phases/projects/status/tag data, project authorization filtering, first_task, total, and pagination metadata.
Implement `projects.update` input schema with project_id and a non-empty patch covering project name and description fields included in this plan.
Implement `projects.update` handler using existing project domain behavior where practical, with permission checks, changed-field output, updated_at output, and run audit logging.
Implement `projects.update_phase` input schema with phase_id and a non-empty patch covering phase name and description fields included in this plan.
Implement `projects.update_phase` handler with phase/project context validation, project update permission checks, changed-field output, updated_at output, and run audit logging.
Implement `projects.update_task` input schema with task_id and a non-empty patch covering task name/title and description fields, excluding phase/project/status relocation fields.
Implement `projects.update_task` handler with task/project context validation, project update permission checks, changed-field output, updated_at output, and run audit logging.
Implement `projects.move_task` input schema with task_id, target phase_id, optional target project_status_mapping_id, optional target_project_id, and optional before/after task positioning fields.
Implement `projects.move_task` same-project phase move behavior using existing status mapping remap rules when no explicit target status is provided.
Implement `projects.move_task` cross-project move behavior using existing status mapping remap/default creation rules when no explicit target status is provided.
Implement `projects.move_task` WBS and order_key regeneration consistent with existing project task move behavior.
Implement `projects.move_task` ticket link project/phase update behavior for all project_ticket_links tied to the moved task.
Implement `projects.move_task` output schema with task_id, previous and current phase/project/status identifiers, updated WBS/order metadata, and updated_at.
Implement `projects.move_task` permission checks, validation errors, and run audit logging.
Implement `projects.assign_task` input schema with primary user, additional user IDs, optional reason/comment if supported, `no_op_if_already_assigned`, and optional idempotency key if needed.
Implement `projects.assign_task` helper to resolve and validate active primary and additional users for the tenant.
Implement `projects.assign_task` no-op comparison covering both primary assignee and additional users.
Implement `projects.assign_task` mutation to update `project_tasks.assigned_to` and reconcile existing additional task resource records.
Implement `projects.assign_task` output schema with task_id, primary assigned user, additional user IDs, no-op state, and updated_at.
Implement `projects.assign_task` permission checks and run audit logging aligned with `tickets.assign` conventions.

Implement `projects.duplicate_task` input schema with source task_id, target phase_id, optional target status mapping, and copy options for primary assignee, additional assignees, checklist, and ticket links.
Implement `projects.duplicate_task` core copy behavior matching existing duplicateTaskToPhase behavior, including copy suffix, estimated hours preservation, and actual hours reset.
Implement `projects.duplicate_task` optional checklist copy behavior using existing checklist item model semantics.
Implement `projects.duplicate_task` optional primary and additional assignee copy behavior using existing task assignment/resource semantics.
Implement `projects.duplicate_task` optional ticket link copy behavior with ticket authorization filtering.
Implement `projects.duplicate_task` output schema with source task ID, new task ID, target phase/project/status identifiers, copied relation counts, and created_at.
Implement `projects.duplicate_task` permission checks and run audit logging.
Implement `projects.delete_task` input and output schemas with task_id, deleted flag, and cleanup count/guard details where practical.
Implement `projects.delete_task` guard that refuses deletion when associated project_task time entries exist, matching existing UI behavior.
Implement `projects.delete_task` cleanup for task ticket links and checklist items before deleting the task, matching existing UI behavior.
Implement `projects.delete_task` permission checks, standardized errors, and run audit logging.
Implement `projects.delete_phase` input/output schemas and handler that mirrors existing phase delete UI/domain behavior.
Implement `projects.delete_phase` project context validation, project delete permission checks, standardized errors, and run audit logging.
Implement `projects.delete` input/output schemas that expose existing project deletion validation result fields plus success/deleted state.
Implement `projects.delete` handler by reusing existing project deletion validation/cleanup behavior where possible, including project tags, task tags, project ticket links, and email reply tokens.
Implement `projects.delete` permission checks, standardized failure output, and run audit logging.
Implement `projects.link_ticket_to_task` input schema with task_id, ticket_id, optional idempotency key, and project/phase picker dependencies where helpful.
Implement `projects.link_ticket_to_task` validation for task, task phase/project context, and ticket existence.
Implement `projects.link_ticket_to_task` insertion/ensure behavior for `project_ticket_links`.
Implement `projects.link_ticket_to_task` insertion/ensure behavior for `ticket_entity_links` with project_task metadata matching `projects.create_task` precedent.
Implement `projects.link_ticket_to_task` output schema with link IDs or created/existing indicators for both link tables.
Implement `projects.link_ticket_to_task` permission checks and run audit logging.
Add shared project/task tag helper behavior mirroring `contacts.add_tag`, including tag normalization, generated colors, tag definition upsert, and mapping conflict-ignore behavior.
Implement `projects.add_tag` schema, action-provided idempotency, project existence validation, project update permission, tag mapping mutation, output counts, and audit logging.
Implement `projects.add_task_tag` schema, action-provided idempotency, task/project context validation, project update permission, tag mapping mutation, output counts, and audit logging.
Register new project picker resource support in the workflow fixed picker resource list and route it to a project picker UI or equivalent search/select control.
Register new project phase picker resource support with dependency handling for selected project fixed values.
Register new project task picker resource support with dependency handling for selected project and/or phase fixed values.
Register new project task status/status-mapping picker resource support with dependency handling for selected project and/or phase fixed values.
Annotate all new action ID fields with workflow editor picker metadata and dependency paths so fixed-value mode is dependency-aware.
Ensure all new actions appear in the workflow registry API with labels, descriptions, categories, input schemas, output schemas, and side-effect/idempotency metadata.
Ensure all side-effectful actions use tenant-scoped transactions, standardized workflow action errors, and workflow run audit records.
Keep `projects.create_task` behavior compatible while adding shared helper code or picker metadata needed by the new project actions.
